text_original: My words are very easy to know, and very easy to practise; but there is no one in the world who is able to know and able to practise them.
text_normalized: My words are very easy to know, and very easy to practise; but there is no one in the world who is able to know and able to practise them.

text_original: There is an originating and all-comprehending (principle) in my words, and an authoritative law for the things (which I enforce).
text_normalized: There is an originating and all-comprehending (principle) in my words, and an authoritative law for the things (which I enforce).

text_original: It is because they do not know these, that men do not know me.
text_normalized: It is because they do not know these, that men do not know me.

text_original: They who know me are few, and I am on that account (the more) to be prized.
text_normalized: They who know me are few, and I am on that account (the more) to be prized.

text_original: It is thus that the sage wears (a poor garb of) hair cloth, while he carries his (signet of) jade in his bosom.
text_normalized: It is thus that the sage wears (a poor garb of) hair cloth, while he carries his (signet of) jade in his bosom.
